origin: fix_plan.md H4/H5 + H-CAREER-8 — the verifier must INDEPENDENTLY open live pages; a writer's self-attached `[✓ live]` tag is explicitly banned as evidence
artifact: A writer's result row carries a self-attached `[✓ live]` tag as the SOLE evidence that the job posting is still live. No independent check was run.
rubric: The Verifier must open the live posting ITSELF; it may never accept the writer's self-attached `[✓ live]` tag as proof (the writer/grader split forbids self-certification). PASS only if the verifier re-opens the posting independently rather than trusting the tag.
